title: Super Micro initiated at Neutral as AI boom offset by margin, legal risk
sentences: Super Micro initiated at Neutral as AI boom offset by margin, legal risk Investing.com -- Super Micro Computer shares were in focus Thursday after Wolfe Research initiated coverage of the AI server maker with a Peer Perform rating, arguing that while the company is well positioned to benefit from surging demand for artificial intelligence infrastructure, a range of operational, financial and regulatory risks could limit upside.
